definition.name: NXafm
definition.doc: An application definition to describe Atomic Force Microscopy (AFM) scanning technique.

field.name: definition
field.doc: Name of the definition that is used for the application.

group.name: experiment_instrument
group.doc: The group explains the core instruments' setup of the AFM experiment as well as the environment of the corresponding instruments.

group.name: cantilever_oscillator
group.doc: A cantilever is a resemblance to a Simple Harmonic Oscillator. In a typical AFM scan, the cantilever approaches the sample. After a certain interdistance between sample and cantilever tip, the cantilever feels an attractive or repulsive force and the cantilever gets further closer to the sample until a user-defined force is reached. Later, the cantilever is retracted from the sample until the cantilever out of the surface force. The defection of the cantilever is measured by the detector (photo-diode) and the signal is converted to the electric signal and passed through the PID feedback loop.

field.name: oscillator_excitation
field.doc: The threshold voltage for oscillator excitation.

group.name: phase_lock_loop
group.doc: Phase locked loop for cantilever lock-in device.

field.name: amplitude_excitation
field.doc: The reference amplitude (also called drive amplitude) of the cantilever.

group.name: height_piezo_sensor
group.doc: The sensor information for the height piezo device.

group.name: piezo_configuration
group.doc: The piezo configuration information like piezoelectric calibration and material properties.

group.name: piezo_material
group.doc: The material description and properties of the piezoelectric scanner materials.
The positioner information like the position of the tip, the position of the sample, PID loop feedback etc.

group.name: XY_piezo_sensor
group.doc: The sensor information for the xy piezo device.

group.name: piezo_configuration
group.doc: The piezo configuration information like piezoelectric calibration and material properties.

group.name: piezo_material
group.doc: The material description and properties of the piezoelectric scanner materials.
The positioner information like the position of the tip, the position of the sample, PID loop feedback etc.

group.name: tip_temperature
group.doc: The temperature of the scan environment or tip of the cantilever.
